name: @plasius/ui-foundry
description: A generic NFR compatible UI component builder tool.
author: Plasius LTD

scripts.build: npm run -w @plasius/ui-foundry-core build && npm run -w @plasius/ui-foundry-components build && npm run -w @plasius/ui-foundry-analytics-appinsights build && npm run -w @plasius/ui-foundry-cli build
scripts.pack:check: npm run -w @plasius/ui-foundry-core pack:check && npm run -w @plasius/ui-foundry-components pack:check && npm run -w @plasius/ui-foundry-analytics-appinsights pack:check && npm run -w @plasius/ui-foundry-cli pack:check
scripts.test: npm run -w @plasius/ui-foundry-core test && npm run -w @plasius/ui-foundry-components test && npm run -w @plasius/ui-foundry-analytics-appinsights test && npm run -w @plasius/ui-foundry-cli test
scripts.typecheck: npm run -w @plasius/ui-foundry-core typecheck && npm run -w @plasius/ui-foundry-components typecheck && npm run -w @plasius/ui-foundry-analytics-appinsights typecheck && npm run -w @plasius/ui-foundry-cli typecheck
scripts.release: echo "Use GitHub Actions workflow 'Release npm Package' to publish." && exit 1
